name: Easy Low-Fat Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can Great Northern beans, rinsed and drained (15 oz)
1 can Navy beans, rinsed and drained (15 oz)
2 teaspoons chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the onion and green pepper in 1/2 cup water until tender.
2. Add beans, tomato paste, and tomatoes. Stir in chili powder, salt (if desired), pepper, and remaining water; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 20 minutes.
